hero.statement: Born in South India. Built for everyone.

craft.heading: We make shoes the old way.
craft.body: Three generations of last-makers, tanners and stitchers in South India taught us that a good shoe can't be rushed. Every KORA pair still passes through the same patient hands — cut, shaped, stitched and finished the way our founders learned it, because craft like that doesn't go out of style.

item.title: Full-grain leather
item.caption: The best hides, tanned for character that only deepens with age.

item.title: Hand stitching
item.caption: Seams closed by hand, pair by pair, by makers who know the craft.

item.title: Natural rubber soles
item.caption: Grip and give from a compound that moves the way you do.

item.title: Cushioned footbeds
item.caption: Shaped for comfort from the very first step, no break-in needed.

her.title: Step up your style
her.sub: Heels, flats and wedges shaped for all-day wear — without giving up the look.

him.title: Own the spotlight
him.sub: Sneakers, formals and boots built to move with you, wherever the day takes you.

comfortTech.heading: Engineered to be worn all day

slide.headline: Spring / Summer ’26
slide.subcopy: Fresh silhouettes across all eight KORA brands — made in South India, built to last.

slide.headline: KORA CloudWalk™
slide.subcopy: Air-cooled memory foam engineered to be worn all day.

under1000.title: Everything under ₹1000
under1000.sub: Great shoes shouldn't cost a fortune. Sliders, flats, and everyday styles that keep it light on your wallet.

aiFinder.heading: Not sure what you need?
aiFinder.sub: Tell our AI what you're after — occasion, budget, comfort level — and get matched to the right pair in seconds.

brandStory.statement: Born in South India. Built for everyone.
brandStory.copy: Every KORA pair starts with full-grain leather and a last-maker's eye — shaped by three generations of craft in South India, and refined for how people actually move, work and live today.
